use_codes.desc: A METHOD OF TREATING ATTENTION DEFICIT HYPERACTIVITY DISORDER BY ADMINISTERING A TRANSDERMAL COMPOSITION CONTAINING AMPHETAMINE

indications.text:
XELSTRYMTM is indicated for the treatment of Attention Deficit Hyperactivity Disorder
(ADHD) in adults and pediatric patients 6 years and older [see CLINICAL STUDIES (14)].
